name: Two Sum
problem: Return indices of two numbers that add up to the target.
insight: For each number, check if complement (target - num) is already in the map.

name: Running Sum of 1D Array
problem: Return array where each element is the cumulative sum up to and including that index.
insight: Each element equals itself plus the previous running sum. Single in-place pass.
code:
for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) nums[i] += nums[i-1];
return nums;

name: Merge Sorted Array
problem: Merge two sorted arrays into the first in-place. The first has extra space at the end.
insight: Merge from the back to avoid overwriting nums1 elements before they are used.

name: Rotate Array
problem: Rotate an array to the right by k steps in-place.
insight: Triple reverse: all → first k → last n-k. Remember k %= n first.

name: Reverse String II
problem: Reverse the first k characters for every 2k block of characters.
insight: Step by 2k. Reverse i to min(i+k-1, end). Handles tail shorter than k automatically.

name: Move Zeroes
problem: Move all zeroes to the end while maintaining relative order of non-zero elements. In-place.
insight: Compact non-zeros forward with write pointer w. Fill remaining slots with zeros.

name: Product of Array Except Self
problem: Return array where each element is the product of all other elements. No division allowed.
insight: Left pass builds prefix products. Right pass multiplies suffix products in. O(1) extra space.

name: Binary Search
problem: Find the index of a target value in a sorted array. Return -1 if not found.
insight: Discard half the range each step. Use l+(r-l)/2 to avoid integer overflow.

name: Maximum Subarray
problem: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum.
insight: Best subarray ending here = max(current element alone, extend previous). Never reset to 0.

name: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array II
problem: Allow each element at most twice in a sorted array in-place. Return the new length.
insight: Write index w: add if w<2 or current != nums[w-2]. Array is sorted so w-2 catches third copies.

name: 3Sum
problem: Find all unique triplets in an array that sum to zero.
insight: Sort. Fix i, shrink l/r inward. Skip duplicates on all three pointers.

name: 4Sum
problem: Find all unique quadruplets in an array that sum to a given target.
insight: Fix i and j, then two pointers l/r. Cast to long to avoid overflow. Skip duplicates on all four.

name: Happy Number
problem: Repeatedly replace a number with the sum of squares of its digits. Return true if it reaches 1.
insight: Use a HashSet to detect cycles. If a number repeats, it loops forever.

name: Longest Consecutive Sequence
problem: Find the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence. O(n) required.
insight: Only start counting where x-1 is absent in the set. Avoids O(n²) by skipping non-starts.

name: Search in Rotated Sorted Array II
problem: Search for a target in a rotated sorted array that may contain duplicates.
insight: When nums[l]==nums[m]==nums[r], shrink both ends. Otherwise identify sorted half and search it.

name: Rotate Image
problem: Rotate an n×n matrix 90 degrees clockwise in-place.
insight: Step 1: Transpose across the main diagonal. Step 2: Reverse each row.

name: Trapping Rain Water
problem: Given bar heights, calculate total water trapped after rain.
insight: Move pointer with smaller current max. Water = currentMax - height at that pointer.

name: Gas Station
problem: Find the starting gas station to complete a circular route, or -1 if impossible.
insight: When tank goes negative at i, reset start to i+1. If total gas >= total cost, a solution exists.

name: Insert Interval
problem: Insert a new interval into sorted non-overlapping intervals, merging as needed.
insight: Copy intervals before new one. Merge overlapping intervals. Copy intervals after.

name: Non-Overlapping Intervals
problem: Find the minimum number of intervals to remove to make the rest non-overlapping.
insight: Sort by end time. Keep interval with earliest end. Count conflicts (overlaps).

name: Jump Game II
problem: Find the minimum number of jumps to reach the last index.
insight: Track farthest reach and current layer end. When i hits end, take a jump, expand to farthest.

name: Find Median from Data Stream
problem: Design a structure supporting addNum and findMedian on a stream of integers.
insight: Max-heap lo (lower half), min-heap hi (upper half). Keep lo.size() == hi.size() or lo.size()+1.

name: Sort an Array
problem: Sort an array of integers without using built-in sort functions.
insight: Divide in half, sort each recursively, merge. Avoids quicksort O(n²) worst case.

name: Spiral Matrix III
problem: Starting from (r,c) in a grid, return all coordinates in clockwise spiral order.
insight: Directions R/D/L/U. Step grows 1,1,2,2,3,3... — increase after every 2 direction changes.

name: Number of Islands
problem: Count the number of islands in a 2D grid of '1' (land) and '0' (water).
insight: Each unvisited '1' is a new island. DFS from it, marking connected land as '0'.
code:
for (int i=0;i<m;i++) for (int j=0;j<n;j++)
    if (grid[i][j]=='1') { count++; dfs(grid,i,j); }

name: Number of Enclaves
problem: Count land cells that cannot reach the boundary of the grid.
insight: Sink all boundary-connected land first via DFS from all 4 edges. Count remaining 1s.

name: Group Anagrams
problem: Group strings that are anagrams of each other into lists.
insight: Build canonical key from char frequency counts. All anagrams share the same key.

name: Minimum Window Substring
problem: Find the smallest substring of s containing all characters of t.
insight: Expand right until all chars satisfied. Shrink left while still valid. Track best window.

name: Substring with Concatenation of All Words
problem: Find all starting indices where a substring equals a concatenation of all words in any order.
insight: Scan each offset 0..wordLen-1. Slide window in word chunks. Reset on unknown word.

name: Word Search II
problem: Find all dictionary words that exist in a 2D character board using adjacent non-reused cells.
insight: Build Trie from words. DFS from every cell, prune via Trie. Mark '#' during DFS, restore after.

name: Sudoku Solver
problem: Fill a 9×9 Sudoku board so every row, column, and 3×3 box contains digits 1–9.
example:
Input: partially filled board with '.' for empty cells
Output: completed valid board
insight: DFS empty cells. Try 1-9, check row/col/box. Backtrack on conflict. Box = (r/3)*3+c/3.

name: Text Justification
problem: Format words into lines of exactly maxWidth. Distribute spaces evenly. Last line left-justified.
insight: Pack words per line. Distribute extra spaces left-to-right. Last line: single spaces + trailing pad.

name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock IV
problem: Find maximum profit from at most k buy-sell transactions.
insight: Track buy[t] and sell[t] per transaction. If k≥n/2, greedily take every positive difference.

name: Dungeon Game
problem: Find minimum initial health to rescue the princess in a grid where cells deal damage or restore health.
insight: Work backward from princess. dp[i][j] = min health needed entering cell. Health never below 1.

name: Max Non-Overlapping Palindrome Substrings
problem: Find the maximum count of non-overlapping palindromic substrings of length at least k.
insight: Scan left to right. At each position try palindrome of length k then k+1. Take earliest-ending valid one.

name: Min Changes to K Semi-Palindromes
problem: Partition string into k parts. Find min character changes to make each a semi-palindrome.
insight: Precompute cost[l][r] for every substring, then partition DP over k splits.

name: Count Anagrams
problem: Count distinct anagram arrangements for each word in sentence. Return product mod 1e9+7.
insight: Each word: len! / product(freq!). Use modular inverse via Fermat's little theorem.

name: Longest Common Prefix After Removal
problem: For each word removed, return the longest common prefix shared by at least k remaining strings.
insight: Build Trie with prefix counts. On removal, adjust counts along path and query max valid depth.

name: Online Majority Element in Subarray
problem: For range queries [left, right, threshold], return element appearing >= threshold times, or -1.
insight: Sample 20 random candidates. Verify frequency via binary search on precomputed position lists.
